source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0000012927 + Boeing Q4/FY2025 earnings release (10-K, FY ended 2025-12-31) + web sources noted per field
_note: Turnaround/cyclical aerospace. FY2025 was the recovery year: Boeing RETURNED TO PROFIT (net income +$2.235B, diluted EPS +$2.48) after 2021-2024 losses, so trailing P/E IS computable but a single recovery year is thin and the brief's 'still negative EPS' premise is outdated. Balance sheet headline figures use the date-consistent YE2025 10-K set (cash+marketable securities $29.4B; consolidated debt $54.1B). EDGAR's narrow XBRL tags gave cash-only $9.441B and LongTermDebt+DebtCurrent $49.817B as of 2026-03-31 (Q1 10-Q) - recorded in notes as a cross-check, not used for the headline. EDGAR's dividend_per_share=$8.22 is a STALE/historical tag; Boeing's COMMON dividend has been suspended since 2020 and remains $0 - overridden to 0.

price.source: Web search (Yahoo Finance / market quote), most recent close

eps_ttm.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0000012927 (EarningsPerShareDiluted, FY2025) + Boeing Q4/FY2025 earnings release; GAAP diluted EPS

eps_history.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0000012927 (EarningsPerShareDiluted, annual GAAP)

dividend_per_share.source: Boeing common-stock dividend SUSPENDED since 2020 and not reinstated as of 2026 (Boeing earnings releases / 10-K). EDGAR's $8.22 tag is stale historical data; overridden to 0.

total_debt.source: Boeing Q4/FY2025 earnings release - consolidated debt $54.1B at YE2025 (short-term + LT debt and capital leases, $8,796M + $45,637M = $54,433M per 10-K; release rounds to $54.1B). EDGAR LongTermDebt+DebtCurrent = $49.817B as of 2026-03-31 (Q1 10-Q, narrower tags) - cross-check.

cash.source: Boeing Q4/FY2025 earnings release - cash AND marketable securities $29.4B at YE2025. EDGAR CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue = $9.441B (cash only, narrower) as of 2026-03-31 - cross-check.

long_term_growth_estimate_pct.source: Forward EPS consensus exists ($0.45-0.47 FY2026e, ~$4.30 FY2027e per analyst consensus via Yahoo/StockAnalysis) but a clean multi-year LT growth % is n/m off a single recovery year and a near-zero 2026 base; left null - documented in notes rather than fabricating a rate.

institutional_ownership_pct.source: Web search - Nasdaq via TheStreet, ~73% institutional ownership

insider_activity.value: net selling (~$6.1M sold vs ~$1.4M bought, ~4.4:1, trailing 12 months)
insider_activity.source: Web search - MarketBeat BA insider trades, trailing 12 months

revenue_fy2025.source: Boeing FY2025 earnings release - $89.5B, +34% YoY (deliveries 600 vs 348)

revenue_q1_2026.source: Boeing Q1-2026 earnings release - $22.2B, +14% YoY (143 deliveries)

net_income_fy2025.source: Boeing FY2025 earnings release - GAAP net income +$2.235B (first profit after 2021-2024 losses)

free_cash_flow.source: Boeing FY2025 FCF -$1.877B (still burning but narrowing; Q4-2025 FCF turned positive +$0.375B; Q1-2026 FCF -$1.5B seasonally weak). Trajectory improving.

stockholders_equity.source: Boeing YE2025 balance sheet - equity turned positive ~+$5.5B after years of deficit; thin for the size but no longer negative.

backlog.source: Boeing earnings releases - $682B at YE2025 (>6,100 jets); record $695B at Q1-2026.

production_rate_737.source: Boeing - 737 MAX production raised to 42/month in Q4-2025 (from stabilized 38) with FAA approval; the central recovery lever.

forward_eps_consensus.source: Analyst consensus via Yahoo / StockAnalysis - FY2026e ~$0.45-0.47, FY2027e ~$4.30 (estimate; steep modeled recovery, treat as hoped-for not proven)

notes: CYCLICAL: a low P/E on peak earnings is a DANGER sign, not a bargain (ch.15). Here the P/E is HIGH (87) on early-recovery earnings - the inverse situation; judge by cycle position, capacity, inventories, not PEG.
PEG and dividend-adjusted PEG are n/a - no clean positive growth rate (sign change from losses to profit).
net_cash is NEGATIVE: net DEBT of -$24.7B (-$24.4/share). This is a leveraged turnaround, the opposite of a Lynch net-cash cushion. The crux is debt survivability + recovery durability.
